seo.title: wakuwaku wombat | Tendon, udon & comfort bowls (template)
seo.description: Demo layout for a relaxed dine-in: crispy tendon rice bowls, hot udon, and sides. Replace suburb, hours, and menu with your client’s real details — copy is generic for sales use.

hero.eyebrow: Your area · Main strip or precinct (example)
hero.title: wakuwaku
descriptionLines: Golden tempura on rice, steam from the noodle pot, and a menu you can list by bowl —
placeholder copy only: swap in your real story, area, and opening hours when you show a client.

features.title: Tendon & rice bowls
features.desc: Tempura, sauce, and rice in one bowl — a strong hero shot for a casual Japanese line. Tweak the wording for your client’s set meals or lunch specials; photos on this page are for layout only.

features.title: Noodle counter mood
features.desc: Hot udon for a quick table turn or a sit-down. Use this block to tease soup bases, toppings, and whether you do take-away or dine-in only.

features.title: Sides to open the meal
features.desc: Edamame, pickles, and other small starts — one line is enough in a sales deck; expand when the real menu is ready.

images.alt: Tempura tendon rice bowl with egg and prawn on the side
Hot udon noodle soup in a bowl with toppings
Steamed edamame in a small dish with salt

menu.footerNote: Names and prices are for layout. Drop in a real menu or PDF link when the venue details are set.

items.desc: Swap proteins to match the photo or your line-up

items.name: Hot udon (plain or kitsune)
items.desc: Soup, noodles, and toppings — describe in your words

items.name: Curry udon or cold option
items.desc: Optional second line for seasonal noodles

items.name: Edamame or pickled starter
items.desc: Small plate — price as you need

items.name: Side rice or miso
items.desc: Add-ons; remove rows you don’t use

lines: Shop or lot number, street or arcade

hours.label: Hours (replace with the venue’s)
lines: Mon – Sun: set kitchen + bar times here (example: 12:00 – late)

reservation.title: Book a table or takeaway

footer.subLine: Content is generic for demos: replace brand, address, and links before going live. Food assets: hero.jpg, food-tendon.jpeg, food-udon.jpg, food-edamame.jpg in /public/hungry-wombat/.
